clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation across insulo-amygdalar and visceromotor circuits associated with the generation, processing, and regulation of valenced physiological states.
These concepts manifest shared functional recruitment within frontostriatal and mesocortical pathways dedicated to computing subjective utility, incentive salience, and goal-directed choice.
These functions predominantly rely on cortical midline and temporoparietal subsystems to construct abstract, internally generated models of the self, conspecifics, and interpersonal narratives.
